name: nexus-workspace
description: Monorepo for @redrixx/nexus — an authority and asserted-lifecycle layer for hot shared state.

scripts.check:exports: npm run build && npm run check:exports --workspace @redrixx/nexus --workspace @redrixx/nexus-react
scripts.check:types:min: npm run build && npx --yes --package typescript@5.0.4 tsc -p tests/typescript-min/tsconfig.json
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run format:check && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run check:exports && npm run test:compat --workspace @redrixx/nexus-react && npm run check:types:min && npm run check:pack && npm run demo:build

author: Cody Magnuson (redrixx)
